exercises.example_sentence: 留学は六ヶ月の予定です。
exercises.translation: The study abroad is planned for six months.
wrong_choice_explanations: 週間 means weeks — six weeks would be too short for meaningful study abroad.
日 means days — six days would be impossibly short for study abroad.
年間 means years — while possible, six years would be much longer than typical study abroad programs.
exercises.hiragana_full: りゅうがくはろっかげつのよていです

audio_alternatives.kanji: 留学は六ヶ月の計画です。
audio_alternatives.hiragana_full: りゅうがくはろっかげつのけいかくです

audio_alternatives.kanji: 六ヶ月間、留学する予定です。
audio_alternatives.hiragana_full: ろっかげつかん、りゅうがくするよていです

exercises.example_sentence: 妊娠は九ヶ月続きます。
wrong_choice_explanations: 週間 means weeks — nine weeks would be too short for full pregnancy.
日間 means days — nine days is nowhere near the duration of pregnancy.
年 means years — pregnancy doesn't last for years, making this completely wrong.
exercises.hiragana_full: にんしんはきゅうかげつつづきます

audio_alternatives.kanji: 妊娠は九ヶ月続く。
audio_alternatives.hiragana_full: にんしんはきゅうかげつつづく

audio_alternatives.kanji: 妊娠期間は九ヶ月です。
audio_alternatives.hiragana_full: にんしんきかんはきゅうかげつです

exercises.example_sentence: このコースは三ヶ月かかります。
wrong_choice_explanations: 週間 means weeks — while three weeks is possible, it would be quite short for a comprehensive course.
日 means days — three days would be too short for most educational courses.
時間 means hours — three hours total would be extremely short for any meaningful course.
exercises.hiragana_full: このこーすはさんかげつかかります

audio_alternatives.kanji: このコースは三ヶ月かかる。
audio_alternatives.hiragana_full: このこーすはさんかげつかかる

audio_alternatives.kanji: このコースの期間は三ヶ月です。
audio_alternatives.hiragana_full: このこーすのきかんはさんかげつです

exercises.example_sentence: 赤ちゃんは今八ヶ月です。
exercises.translation: The baby is now eight months old.
wrong_choice_explanations: 歳 means years old — eight years old would be far beyond baby age.
日目 means day (ordinal) — babies aren't typically described by day count after the first few weeks.
週目 means week (ordinal) — while possible for very young babies, eight weeks would typically use 週間.
exercises.hiragana_full: あかちゃんはいまはちかげつです

audio_alternatives.kanji: 赤ちゃんは今、生後八ヶ月です。
audio_alternatives.hiragana_full: あかちゃんはいませいごはちかげつです

audio_alternatives.kanji: 赤ちゃんの年齢は八ヶ月です。
audio_alternatives.hiragana_full: あかちゃんのねんれいははちかげつです

exercises.example_sentence: 工事は十二ヶ月かかります。
exercises.translation: The construction will take twelve months.
wrong_choice_explanations: 日間 means days — twelve days would be too short for significant construction work.
週間 means weeks — twelve weeks would be quite short for major construction projects.
年 means years — while possible for very large projects, twelve years would be unusually long for typical construction.
exercises.hiragana_full: こうじはじゅうにかげつかかります

audio_alternatives.kanji: 工事は一年かかります。
audio_alternatives.hiragana_full: こうじはいちねんかかります

audio_alternatives.kanji: 工事は十二ヶ月かかる。
audio_alternatives.hiragana_full: こうじはじゅうにかげつかかる

exercises.example_sentence: 契約は六ヶ月間有効です。
exercises.translation: The contract is valid for six months.
wrong_choice_explanations: 週間 means weeks — six weeks would be quite short for contract validity.
年間 means years — while six years is possible, it would be much longer than typical short-term contracts.
分間 means minutes — six minutes would be absurdly short for any contract validity period.
exercises.hiragana_full: けいやくはろっかげつかんゆうこうです。

audio_alternatives.kanji: 契約の有効期間は六ヶ月です。
audio_alternatives.hiragana_full: けいやくのゆうこうきかんはろっかげつです。

audio_alternatives.kanji: 契約は六ヶ月間使えます。
audio_alternatives.hiragana_full: けいやくはろっかげつかんつかえます。

exercises.example_sentence: 治療に四ヶ月必要です。
exercises.translation: Four months are needed for the treatment.
wrong_choice_explanations: 週間 means weeks — while four weeks of treatment is possible, it would be relatively short for comprehensive treatment.
日間 means days — four days would be too short for meaningful medical treatment.
年間 means years — four years would be extremely long for most treatments.
exercises.hiragana_full: ちりょうにしかげつひつようです

audio_alternatives.kanji: 治療には四ヶ月かかります。
audio_alternatives.hiragana_full: ちりょうにはしかげつかかります

audio_alternatives.kanji: 治療のために四ヶ月が必要です。
audio_alternatives.hiragana_full: ちりょうのためにしかげつがひつようです

exercises.example_sentence: アルバイトを二ヶ月しました。
exercises.translation: I did a part-time job for two months.
wrong_choice_explanations: 時間 means hours — two hours would be too short to meaningfully describe part-time work duration.
年間 means years — two years would be much longer than typical short-term part-time work.
日 means days — two days would be too short to meaningfully describe part-time work duration.
exercises.hiragana_full: アルバイトをにかげつしました

audio_alternatives.kanji: 二ヶ月、アルバイトをしました。
audio_alternatives.hiragana_full: にかげつ、アルバイトをしました

audio_alternatives.kanji: 二ヶ月間、アルバイトをしました。
audio_alternatives.hiragana_full: にかげつかん、アルバイトをしました

exercises.example_sentence: 研修期間は五ヶ月です。
exercises.translation: The training period is five months.
wrong_choice_explanations: 分 means minutes — five minutes would be absurdly short for any training program.
日 means days — five days would be too short for meaningful training programs.
年 means years — five years would be extremely long for most training programs.
exercises.hiragana_full: けんしゅうきかんはごかげつです

audio_alternatives.kanji: 研修期間は五ヶ月あります。
audio_alternatives.hiragana_full: けんしゅうきかんはごかげつあります

audio_alternatives.kanji: 研修は五ヶ月間です。
audio_alternatives.hiragana_full: けんしゅうはごかげつかんです

exercises.example_sentence: プロジェクトは八ヶ月で完成します。
exercises.translation: The project will be completed in eight months.
wrong_choice_explanations: 秒 means seconds — eight seconds would be impossibly short for any project completion.
年間 means years — while eight years is possible for very large projects, it would be much longer than typical projects.
日 means days — eight days would be too short for meaningful project completion.
exercises.hiragana_full: ぷろじぇくとははちかげつでかんせいします

audio_alternatives.kanji: プロジェクトは八ヶ月で終わります。
audio_alternatives.hiragana_full: ぷろじぇくとははちかげつでおわります

audio_alternatives.kanji: プロジェクトは八ヶ月で完成する。
audio_alternatives.hiragana_full: ぷろじぇくとははちかげつでかんせいする
